## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Chore (CI, dependencies, tooling)

## How Was This Tested?

Describe how you verified your changes work correctly.

- [ ] I ran the unit tests: `pytest tests/unit/`
- [ ] I ran the integration tests: `pytest tests/integration/`
- [ ] I tested manually on a Raspberry Pi / local machine (describe what you tested)
- [ ] N/A — documentation or config change only

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the coding standards in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All CI checks pass (lint, tests, coverage ≥60%, security audit, shellcheck)
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for new behaviour
- [ ] I have updated documentation where relevant
- [ ] My commit messages follow the Conventional Commits format
- [ ] No secrets, API tokens, or real credentials appear anywhere in this PR
- [ ] If this PR touches authentication, subprocess calls, or the Conduit adapter — I have noted that below
